title: Line 14600 – Net federal supplements paid - Canada.ca
content:
## Line 14600 – Net federal supplements paid
The guaranteed income supplement (GIS) you received in the tax year, as well as the net amount of a spouse's allowance , is shown in box 21 of your T4A(OAS) slip and must be reported as income.
If you have questions about the amounts shown on your T4A(OAS) slip , your entitlement, or your eligibility for the GIS, contact Service Canada or call 1-800-277-9914 .
To view your T4A(OAS) slip online, sign in to your CRA account .

## Completing your tax return
Enter on line 14600 of your return the amount from box 21 of your T4A(OAS) slip .
If the amount is negative , enter "0."
If your net income before adjustments on line 23400 of your return is:
- $93,454 or less , claim a deduction on line 25000 for the net federal supplements paid that you reported on line 14600
- more than $93,454 , see line 25000

## Forms and publications
- Line 25000 – Other payments deduction

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
